title: Smoky German Sweet Potato Crumble
description: A decadent and indulgent dish featuring demerara sugar, smoke flavor, and keto-friendly components for a comforting yet light meal.

ingredients.name: smoke flavor (liquid smoke or smoked paprika)

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Rinse sweet potatoes and pierce them with a fork.
In a mixing bowl, combine coconut oil, demerara sugar, cocoa powder, vanilla extract, smoke flavor, egg substitute, and salt. Mix well until smooth.
Carefully cut the top off each sweet potato and scoop out the flesh into the mixing bowl, leaving enough skin to hold the filling together when spooned back in.

Pour the mixture into the hollowed-out sweet potatoes and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 40 minutes or until the center is set but still slightly soft when pierced with a knife.
While the sweet potatoes are baking, prepare the crumble topping by mixing almond flour with enough additional coconut oil to make it spreadable.
Once the sweet potatoes are done, remove from oven and spoon the warm crumble mixture over each one. Return to oven for another 5 minutes or until golden brown on top.
Let cool before serving to allow filling to settle slightly.
